positive: A highly detailed, stylized geometric hummingbird in mid-flight, viewed against a contrasting gradient background of deep teal and vibrant turquoise. The hummingbird should feature iridescent plumage rendered with clean, bold vector lines and glowing accents, giving it a futuristic, elegant appearance. Incorporate stylized bioluminescent flowers and sweeping floral mandalas that frame the central subject, emphasizing sharp silhouettes and dynamic movement. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for repeating textile patterns or single chest prints. Use maximalist composition principles with clean, negative space elements to balance the detail. Flat graphic design aesthetic mixed with photorealistic iridescent textures. Vivid jewel tones, strong contrast, vector art style, ultra-high resolution, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, signature, watermarks, low quality, bad anatomy, text, typography, logos, brand names, extra limbs, messy, amateur, grainy, sketch, cartoonish, realism overload
